description.ko: 유리를 통과하는 빛의 굴절을 정교하게 시각화하여, 단일 광선이 광학 물리학의 원리에 따라 찬란한 색의 스펙트럼으로 변하는 순간을 포착했습니다.
description.en: An intricate visual study of light bending through glass, capturing the moment a single beam transforms into a brilliant spectrum of color through the laws of optical physics.

prompt: Cinematic close-up of a triangular glass prism refracting a sharp beam of white light into a vivid, multi-colored rainbow spectrum. Caustic light patterns on a minimalist dark grey surface, sharp focus, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, ray tracing, soft bokeh background, ethereal atmosphere.
